definitions.text: Connected to or depending on something else; comparative.
examples: We've been discussing the relative merits of various methods of transportation.

definitions.text: Expressed in relation to another item, rather than in complete form.
examples: The relative URL /images/pic.jpg, when evaluated in the context of http://example.com/index.html, corresponds to the absolute URL http://example.com/images/pic.jpg.

definitions.text: Someone connected by blood, marriage, or adoption; someone in the same family.
Something kindred or related to something else.
